Package neqsim.process.util.optimizer

Class InstalledCapacityTableLoader

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.optimizer.InstalledCapacityTableLoader
public final class InstalledCapacityTableLoader extends Object
Loads installed equipment capacity limits from a CSV table and attaches them to a process model.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

    Description
    static class

    Installed capacity record loaded from the table.

  • Constructor Details

    • InstalledCapacityTableLoader

      private InstalledCapacityTableLoader()
      Utility class constructor.

  • Method Details

    • load

      public static List<InstalledCapacityTableLoader.InstalledCapacityRecord> load(ProcessModel model, String filePath) throws IOException
      Loads installed capacity constraints from a CSV file.
      Parameters:
      model - process model to attach constraints to
      filePath - CSV file path
      Returns:
      loaded records
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading fails

    • load

      public static List<InstalledCapacityTableLoader.InstalledCapacityRecord> load(ProcessModel model, Path filePath) throws IOException
      Loads installed capacity constraints from a CSV file.

      Required columns are area, equipment, constraint, currentValueAddress, designValue, unit, and severity. Optional columns are maxValue, type, enabled, and description.

      Parameters:
      model - process model to attach constraints to
      filePath - CSV file path
      Returns:
      loaded records
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading fails

    • parseRecord

      private static InstalledCapacityTableLoader.InstalledCapacityRecord parseRecord(ProcessModel model, Map<String,Integer> headerIndex, List<String> values, int rowNumber)
      Parses and attaches one installed capacity record.
      Parameters:
      model - process model
      headerIndex - map from normalized header to column index
      values - CSV row values
      rowNumber - row number for diagnostics
      Returns:
      installed capacity record

    • attachRecord

      private static void attachRecord(ProcessModel model, InstalledCapacityTableLoader.InstalledCapacityRecord record, String typeText, String description)
      Attaches a loaded record to its target equipment.
      Parameters:
      model - process model
      record - installed capacity record
      typeText - optional constraint type text
      description - optional description

    • validateTargetExists

      private static void validateTargetExists(ProcessModel model, String areaName, String equipmentName, int rowNumber)
      Verifies that the target equipment exists.
      Parameters:
      model - process model
      areaName - area name
      equipmentName - equipment name
      rowNumber - CSV row number

    • buildHeaderIndex

      private static Map<String,Integer> buildHeaderIndex(List<String> headers)
      Builds a normalized header index.
      Parameters:
      headers - header values
      Returns:
      map from normalized header to index

    • getRequired

      private static String getRequired(Map<String,Integer> headerIndex, List<String> values, String header, int rowNumber)
      Gets a required CSV value.
      Parameters:
      headerIndex - header index map
      values - row values
      header - required header
      rowNumber - row number for diagnostics
      Returns:
      trimmed value

    • getOptional

      private static String getOptional(Map<String,Integer> headerIndex, List<String> values, String header)
      Gets an optional CSV value.
      Parameters:
      headerIndex - header index map
      values - row values
      header - optional header
      Returns:
      trimmed value, or empty string when absent

      Returns:
